scores.correctness_notes: Response is factually accurate and covers all key components from the gold standard: ContainerPath, LocalPath, PathProtocol, ensure_contents with correct signature and return value semantics. The ensure_contents default mode 0o644 matches gold standard's 420 (same value). Extra details like unlink, rmdir, owner/group, is_file/is_dir are plausible pathlib-like extensions not contradicted by the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: none — extra methods listed (unlink, rmdir, owner, group, is_file, is_dir) are consistent with a pathlib-like interface and not clearly fabricated; PebbleConnectionError is confirmed in gold standard; all parameter names and types match
